subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou ever drink from the Fountain of divine knowledge and remain engaged, at every moment, in the remembrance of the Beloved of all existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لازال از کوثرعرفان بیاشامی و بذکر محبوب امکان مشغول باشی هر نفسی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
